the-great-catch-up.name: The Great Catch-Up
the-great-catch-up.description: $497 program + webinar funnel: all 17 deliverables complete, ready to launch

ads.title: Ad 1: Discipline Wasn't the Problem
ads.headline: Your Discipline Wasn't the Problem
ads.imageDirection: Checklist graphic: 401k, skipped vacations, 30 years discipline all checked. 'Result: still behind' unchecked. Cream bg (#F5F0E8), navy text (#1B365D).

ads.title: Ad 2: The Savings of a 30-Year-Old
ads.headline: Behind on Retirement? See the Math.
ads.hook: You're 53 with the retirement savings of a 30-year-old. Now what?
ads.imageDirection: Bold white text on dark navy (#1B365D). Hook text as the visual. 'Now what?' in warm gold (#C4982E). No photo, text-only editorial style.

ads.title: Ad 3: The Bitcoin I Almost Bought
ads.headline: You Watched. You Waited. Now What?
ads.hook: I've been 'about to buy Bitcoin' since it was $1,000.
ads.imageDirection: Price staircase: $1K 'wait for dip', $10K 'too risky', $40K 'too late', $60K 'bubble'. Charcoal bg (#333), gold 'The door isn't closed.' Optional Scott headshot.

ads.title: Ad 4: Built for You vs. Built for Everyone
ads.headline: Crypto Education Built for 50+
ads.hook: Every crypto course was built for 25-year-olds. This one wasn't.
ads.imageDirection: Split-screen: Left (cool gray) 'Typical Crypto Course' young guy at desk. Right (warm gold) 'The Great Catch-Up' with Scott's photo. Bottom: 'Not for 25-year-olds. For you.'

ads.title: Ad 5: The Conversation You've Been Avoiding
ads.headline: Stop Fighting. Start Planning.
ads.hook: Every time you bring up retirement, the conversation turns into blame, fear, or silence.
ads.imageDirection: Kitchen table scene: couple 50s-60s, papers/laptop visible, quiet distance (not fighting). Dark overlay: 'Stop Fighting About Retirement.' Gold: 'Start Planning Together.' Choose stock carefully for Meta policy.

ads.title: Ad 6: Working Until You Die
ads.headline: This Doesn't Have to Be Your Future
ads.hook: The retirement plan nobody talks about: working until your body gives out.
ads.imageDirection: Option A: Bold text on charcoal/navy, '64% fear this more than death' in gold. Option B: Older person in work uniform, shot with dignity. Prepare 'Working until you can't' backup for Meta policy.

ads.title: Ad 7: Too Smart to Be This Broke
ads.headline: Smart Wasn't the Problem. The Vehicle Was.
ads.hook: You can explain compound interest. You understand inflation.
ads.imageDirection: Knowledge checklist on charcoal: 'compound interest' [check], 'reads financial books' [check], 'follows markets' [check], 'knows more than advisors' [check]. Then: 'Retirement account: not enough.' in gold.

ads.title: Ad 8: The Vehicle Was Wrong
ads.headline: Change the Vehicle. Change the Math.
ads.hook: What if you didn't start too late?
ads.imageDirection: Two calculators side by side. Left (muted): 'Old Vehicle: $23K/yr x 7% x 15yrs = not enough'. Right (gold): 'New Vehicle: Change one variable. Change everything.' Scott headshot bottom-right.

ads.title: Story/Reel 2: Working Until You Can't
ads.headline: Tap to learn what people 50+ are doing instead
ads.hook: Working until you die isn't a plan. 64% of Americans over 50 fear this more than death.
ads.imageDirection: 1080x1920 vertical. Charcoal bg. 'Working until you die' (white bold) / 'isn't a plan.' (gold). '64% fear this more than death' (white smaller). Prep 'Working until you can't' alt for policy.
